generated_oml:
instance ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automates the transformation of BIM models into runtime artifacts via model-to-model and model-to-text transformations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BuildingComponentModel, DeviceMetadataModel, ControlLogicModel
]

instance EclipseHonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware platform enabling real-time data exchange and bidirectional communication between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance DittoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware platform enabling real-time data exchange and bidirectional communication between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Visualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Provides rich, interactive 3D visualization for DT monitoring and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InteractiveSimulationService
]

instance RevitBIMEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM software environment for device modeling and control logic definition"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlLogicModel
]

instance ArchiCADBIMEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM software environment for device modeling and control logic definition"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlLogicModel
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensors for occupancy detection within building zones"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataStream
]

instance TenantOccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-resolution occupancy sensors tracking individual tenant presence patterns"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TenantSpecificOccupancyData
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensors measuring indoor environmental parameters across building zones"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataStream
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensors measuring relative humidity levels in building air spaces"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataStream
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Light sensors measuring ambient light levels for adaptive lighting control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataStream
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy meters tracking real-time power consumption of building systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataStream
]

instance LightingDimmerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators controlling lighting dimmer levels for energy-efficient operation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingDimmerState
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC actuators controlling temperature setpoints and airflow distribution"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HVACSetpointState
]

instance AutomatedDoorOperator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Automated door operators managing building access points and traffic flow"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DoorStateData
]

instance OccupancyDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor, TenantOccupancySensor
]

instance TenantSpecificOccupancyData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TenantOccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance LightingDimmerState : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingDimmerActuator
]

instance HVACSetpointState : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HVACActuator
]

instance DoorStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AutomatedDoorOperator
]

instance BuildingComponentModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically rich 3D models incorporating geometric, spatial, and functional attributes of building components with embedded device metadata"
]

instance DeviceMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Metadata model containing sensor/actuator IDs, control logic definitions, and tenant-specific configurations"
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Domain-specific control semantics (lighting automation rules, HVAC setpoints) embedded directly in BIM models"
]

instance RealTimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live operational data (sensor readings, control signals) streamed via Eclipse Hono/Ditto for dynamic updates"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataStream, TemperatureDataStream,
                         HumidityDataStream, LightLevelDataStream,
                         EnergyConsumptionDataStream, LightingDimmerState,
                         HVACSetpointState, DoorStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoMiddleware, DittoMiddleware
]

instance ControlSignalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Bidirectional control signals exchanged between virtual and physical systems for adaptive building management"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightingDimmerState, HVACSetpointState
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoMiddleware, DittoMiddleware
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time performance metrics (energy consumption, indoor environmental quality) for Facility Managers"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalPerformanceMetrics
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics (BOREALIS reinforcement learning) for optimizing energy use and occupant comfort"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationRecommendations
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated commissioning and control logic embedding for BIM-centric frameworks"
]

instance InteractiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive simulation for performance analysis (energy consumption, indoor environmental quality)"
]

instance CustomServiceIntegration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points for DT Engineers to add domain-specific plugins"
]

instance OperationalPerformanceMetrics : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time performance metrics including energy consumption and indoor environmental quality"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationRecommendations : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive recommendations for energy-efficient building operations"
]

instance DynamicControlAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "DT services dynamically adjust control logic (lighting schedules, HVAC setpoints) based on live data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BuildingZoneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains OccupancySensor, TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor,
                 LightLevelSensor, EnergyConsumptionSensor,
                 LightingDimmerActuator, HVACActuator,
                 AutomatedDoorOperator
]

instance TenantSpecificZoneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains TenantOccupancySensor, LightingDimmerActuator
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **virtual-to-physical interaction** is facilitated by **bidirectional control signals** generated by DT services (e.g., lighting optimization, reinforcement learning-based control policies from BOREALIS) and transmitted back to physical actuators via the same middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto). The framework ensures that control logic defined in BIM (e.g., lighting dimming thresholds, HVAC setpoints) is dynamically applied to physical systems in real-time, enabling adaptive building operations. This interaction is enabled through standardized extension points for service integration."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates with **real-time data exchange and synchronization**, ensuring low-latency interactions between physical and virtual components. The framework emphasizes **live synchronization** for immediate decision-making, with real-time monitoring and predictive analytics supporting operational efficiency. While the exact latency metrics are not specified, the emphasis on real-time capabilities (e.g., 'live synchronization') and bidirectional communication aligns with sub-second response times for critical operational adjustments."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is organized as a **service-oriented, BIM-centric ecosystem** with the following orchestration:
  - **Centralized DT Hub**: Acts as the core integration point for BIM models, middleware (Elice Hono/Ditto), and visualization (Unreal Engine).
  - **Modular Service Layers**: Includes:
    - **Runtime Interface Layer**: Handles real-time data exchange (e.g., sensor/actuator communication).
    - **Optimization/Analytics Layer**: Supports adaptive control (e.g., BOREALIS’ reinforcement learning) and predictive maintenance.
    - **Visualization Layer**: Enables interactive 3D monitoring via Unreal Engine.
  - **Interoperability via BIM Semantics**: Ensures all components (e.g., sensors, actuators, services) share a unified semantic foundation (e.g., BIM element IDs, control logic rules).
  The framework uses the **ODTE metric** to evaluate the coherence of internal twins (e.g., lighting, HVAC) within the constellation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans the following **life cycle stages** of the physical building:
  1. **Design Phase**: BIM models are enriched with device configurations (e.g., sensors, actuators) and control logic by **Building Control Engineers** to define the ideal virtual representation.
  2. **Construction Phase**: The DT is **automatically deployed** from BIM models, with real-time data integration enabled via middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto). The framework ensures **synchronization between as-manufactured and as-designed models**.
  3. **Operation Phase**: The DT provides **real-time monitoring, adaptive control, and predictive maintenance** (e.g., BOREALIS’ reinforcement learning for energy optimization). The framework supports **runtime evolution** (e.g., service upgrades, sensor additions) without full redeployment.
  The DT covers representations of the building as **operated** (dynamic, real-time) and **as designed** (static, idealized) to bridge gaps between phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The DT’s fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  1. **Verification/Validation Mechanisms**:
     - **Model Validation**: BIM models are validated against domain standards (e.g., BIM standards for AECO) to ensure semantic correctness.
     - **Runtime Synchronization**: Real-time data from physical sensors is continuously compared against the DT’s virtual state to detect **semantic drift** (e.g., using ODTE metric).
  2. **Uncertainty Management**:
     - **Sensor Data Quality**: Middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) handles data normalization and error mitigation (e.g., filtering noisy readings).
     - **Control Logic Calibration**: Adaptive services (e.g., BOREALIS’ reinforcement learning) iteratively refine control policies based on post-occupancy sensor feedback.
  3. **Error Handling**: The framework includes **fallback mechanisms** (e.g., fallback control strategies) for cases where real-time synchronization fails."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **middleware-based communication** (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for real-time data exchange, facilitating bidirectional synchronization between physical sensors and virtual models. While specific protocols (e.g., MQTT, WebSockets) are not detailed, the framework emphasizes robust connectivity for low-latency operational feedback."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as a **scalable, service-oriented platform** with standardized extension points for modular integration. Deployment leverages middleware (Hono/Ditto) for real-time data handling, though specific hosting infrastructure (e.g., cloud/edge environments) is not detailed in the documents."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates horizontally with external systems through **standardized BIM-based workflows** (e.g., BIM collaboration platforms) and middleware interoperability (Eclipse Hono/Ditto). While specific external platforms (e.g., Azure, COBie) are not mentioned, the framework supports seamless exchange with other AECO systems via BIM standards."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
  1. **BIM Standards**: Building Information Modeling (BIM) as the semantic backbone for modeling building components and relationships.
  2. **Middleware Standards**: Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange.
  3. **ODTE Metric**: A proprietary metric for evaluating DT entanglement and interoperability."
]
